subject: Sableye, a small dark creature with large faceted gem eyes, wide grin, and clawed hands in a cave setting
description: A small, hunched dark-purple creature crouches center-frame with enormous faceted gem-like eyes — one visibly reddish, one bluish — that glow with an eerie inner light. Its mouth is stretched into a wide, toothy grin and its clawed hands are raised slightly. The body is compact and jagged in silhouette, with a rough gem-studded texture on the chest. The background is a dark cave interior with deep purples and hints of crystalline or rocky surfaces. The overall tone is gleefully sinister — a creature that revels in mischief.
foreground: dark-purple creature with gem eyes, wide grin, clawed hands raised
background: dark cave with crystalline or rocky surfaces, deep purple tones
